scope.rule: Non-action Data Cloud planes, delivery, extensions, and contracts must not import AEP internals or depend on Action Plane modules.
scope.semanticRule: Non-action Data Cloud planes, delivery, extensions, and contracts must not expose AEP-owned EventCloud, PatternSpec/EPL, EventOperator, EventOperatorCapability runtime, CEP, adaptive event runtime, pattern promotion, recommended/predictive pattern, or Pattern lifecycle semantics.
